A series of mysterious and bizarre phenomena have appeared in the Valley. Your job is to explore and uncover what's causing these eerie events!
Sanity
Your Sanity will decrease in certain areas and slowly recover outside of them.
As your Sanity drops, your vision and stamina will be affected.

title: Arknights
notes:
Update Note 
-This is a mandatory update, after which you should download and install the app again manually. Please log in and bind your account to at least one third-party account before the update if you are currently using a guest account to play the game.

title: War Robots: Multiplayer Game
notes:
WORLD IRON CUP: A new trial of mettle, raw strength, and iron will by DSC!
VULCAN: Forge this robot's upgrade in the heat of a battle!
ULTIMATE MUROMETZ: The sky rains non-stop fire barrages!
NEW PAINTJOBS: Skyros and Ochokochi stand ready for a new round of Soccer Punch!
SHENZHEN SPECIAL EDITION: Step onto a completely new kind of turf!
